title: Congo Says Many Dead After Landslide at Rebel-Held Tantalum Mine
description: The Democratic Republic of Congo’s mines ministry said a landslide in a major tantalum mining area occupied by rebels left many dead on Tuesday.
content:
(Bloomberg) The Democratic Republic of Congos mines ministry said a landslide in a major tantalum mining area occupied by rebels left many dead on Tuesday.

en: Congo Says Many Dead After Landslide at Rebel-Held Tantalum Mine. The Democratic Republic of Congo’s mines ministry said a landslide in a major tantalum mining area occupied by rebels left many dead on Tuesday.

title: DR Congo government says 200 killed after landslide at rebel-held mine
description: The M23, which controls the coltan-rich area, has not commented and the death toll is hard to verify.
content: More than 200 people, including 70 children, have been killed after a landslide caused a collapse in a mining area in the east of the Democratic Republic of Congo, the government says.
de: Nach Angaben der Regierung der DR Kongo sind bei einem Erdrutsch in einer von Rebellen kontrollierten Mine 200 Menschen getötet worden. Die M23, die das Coltan-reiche Gebiet kontrolliert, hat sich nicht geäußert und die Zahl der Todesopfer ist schwer zu überprüfen.
en: DR Congo government says 200 killed after landslide at rebel-held mine. The M23, which controls the coltan-rich area, has not commented and the death toll is hard to verify.
la: DR Congo imperium dicit 200 occisos post lapsum apud rebellem habitum meum. M23, quae regio coltano-divitis regitur, annotavit et vectigal mortiferum difficile est cognoscere.
